name: Pour La France's Fudge Caramel Cake - Express News
recipeInstructions:
FOR CAKE:
1. Slice round cake layers horizontally in half to make 4 round cake layers.
2. Place one layer on a plate and top with Fudge Icing, Caramel Sauce, and Cashews.
3. Repeat with the next two cake layers.
4. Place the final cake layer on top, frost the top and sides of the cake with Fudge Icing, and cover the sides of the cake with chopped cashews.
FUDGE ICING:
1. Bring cream to a boil.
2. Stir in chocolate until melted and smooth. This will be very soft but will harden when cooled.
3. Refrigerate until it reaches a workable consistency. (Note: The time it takes to reach a workable consistency depends on the weather. This is much like making fudge candy.)
CARAMEL SAUCE:
1. Bring the first four ingredients to a boil and reduce to a thick syrup.
2. Very carefully, because it will splatter, add cream.
3. Refrigerate until cool.
